description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in a fitted, collared long-sleeve shirt and straight-cut pants, both appearing to be made from a smooth, fabric-like material. The shirt is buttoned up and tucked into the pants, which are secured with a visible belt. The figure's shoes are formal, with a low heel and rounded toe, suggesting a business or smart-casual style. The hands are relaxed and open at the sides, and the head features a full head of hair styled with a side-swept fringe. The overall build is average, with realistic human proportions and subtle anatomical details.
description: A male adult figure in a collared shirt, straight pants, and formal shoes, with a side-swept hairstyle and a relaxed standing posture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the collared shirt, belt, and formal shoes, with the face and hairstyle clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the side-swept hair, and the straight fit of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt, pants, and shoes, as well as the back of the hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the fit of the clothing from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve collared shirt, straight-cut pants, formal belt
